title: Nirvana in Fire
synopsis: A disgraced general returns under a new identity to clear his name and seek justice, using his brilliant mind to navigate the treacherous imperial court.

title: The Story of Ming Lan
synopsis: A clever and cautious girl born of a concubine navigates family politics and romance in the Song Dynasty while hiding her true intelligence.

title: Word of Honor
synopsis: A retired assassin and a carefree cult leader cross paths and become entangled in a conspiracy involving a deadly manual coveted by the martial arts world.

title: Go Ahead
synopsis: Three broken families come together when their children form an unlikely family bond, exploring themes of love, loss, and what it means to belong.

title: The Untamed
synopsis: Two cultivators reunite after one is reborn into a rogue body, uncovering a conspiracy that destroyed both their clans sixteen years prior.

title: My Brilliant Friend
synopsis: A bubbly and optimistic girl falls for a cold and distant doctor, slowly breaking down his walls through her infectious energy and kindness.

title: Nothing But Thirty
synopsis: Three women turning thirty face the pressures of marriage, career, and identity in modern Shanghai, navigating life's challenges together.

title: Love Between Fairy and Devil
synopsis: A lowly fairy accidentally switches bodies with the most powerful devil lord, leading to a chaotic and comedic romance between two unlikely souls.

title: Ashes of Love
synopsis: A flower deity born without the ability to feel love becomes entangled in a celestial conflict and a complicated love triangle that spans multiple realms.

title: A Love So Beautiful
synopsis: A cheerful high school girl pursues her cold but kind-hearted neighbor through their school years and into adulthood in this classic coming-of-age love story.
